layman_headline: Crypto market is fearful and most altcoins are in downtrends — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a 'Fear' mood, with Bitcoin dominating and sucking value away from smaller coins. Almost every swing candidate on the watchlist is in a downtrend with bearish chart patterns. While a few coins like TRUMP and BONK are deeply oversold (which sometimes triggers a bounce), the charts are showing strong selling pressure with no clear reversal signals yet. Catching a falling knife in this environment is risky.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines and wait. No coin currently offers a high-confidence entry with a clear risk/reward edge. Watch for Ethereum to pull back to the $1,800 support level — that could offer a better entry if it holds.
expert_reasoning: No candidate presents a compelling risk/reward setup for immediate entry. BONK has RSI near 31 (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate) but chart bias is -2.0 with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu — classic capitulation patterns that often have further downside before any bounce. TRUMP RSI at 22 is deeply oversold but the chart shows bearish structure with only 1:1 R/R. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but RSI at 59 and +13% in 7 days suggest it's already extended — poor entry timing. ETH at RSI 39 with +17.2% 5-day momentum is the most interesting, but it's below all MAs with a -0.7 chart bias. The prudent play is to wait for ETH to test $1,800 support and form a reversal pattern. BTC dominance at 56.6% continues to pressure alts, and Fear at 28 hasn't reached the extreme levels (sub-20) that historically signal the best contrarian entries.
risk_factors: BTC weekend volatility with geopolitical oil supply risks (CryptoSlate) could trigger a sharp selloff across all alts
BTC dominance at 56.6% continues to drain capital from altcoins — no alt season catalyst visible
Fear & Greed at 28 is fearful but not extreme — could deteriorate further before a true bottom forms
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — a bounce with volume confirmation would be an entry trigger
BTC behavior around $65K resistance and whether options-driven call spreads targeting $72K gain traction
Fear & Greed index — a drop below 20 or a sharp reversal above 35 would change the setup materially
market_context: The market is in Fear territory (28/100), BTC dominance is elevated at 56.6% crushing altcoin performance, and most swing candidates show bearish chart structures. Weekend trading with geopolitical risks around oil supply adds a dangerous volatility overlay.
context_banner: Fear-driven market with no clean altcoin setups — capital preservation beats forcing a trade.

key_signals.description: RSI is our most reliable signal (80% win rate). TRUMP at 22 and BONK at 31 are oversold, but chart structures are too bearish to act on RSI alone.
Fear & Greed at 28 confirms risk-off sentiment, but hasn't reached extreme fear (<20) levels that historically produce the strongest bounce setups.
Bitcoin trading through a 'dangerous weekend' with 20% of global oil supply at risk — adds short-term downside tail risk to any new position.
Massive BTC call spreads targeting $72K by month-end around the Fed meeting — bullish medium-term catalyst for the broader market if BTC rallies.
LDO shows Three White Soldiers (bullish) with +0.85 chart bias, but already extended +13% in 7 days. Most other candidates show strongly bearish chart patterns.
